1574.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The pen is lifted from three: from the sleeping person until he wakes up, from the young child until he reaches puberty, and from the insane person until he regains his reason.' Hammad also said: 'And from the feeble-minded person until he gains reason.'
1574.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Pena diangkat dari tiga orang: dari orang yang tidur hingga ia bangun, dari anak kecil hingga ia baligh, dan dari orang gila hingga ia berakal.' Hammad juga berkata: 'Dan dari orang yang lemah akal hingga ia berakal.'

1575.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'The blood of a Muslim man is not lawful except in one of three cases: disbelief after faith, adultery after marriage, or killing a person, for which he himself shall be killed.'
1575.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uthman ibn Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Darah seorang Muslim tidak halal kecuali dalam salah satu dari tiga hal: kufur setelah beriman, zina setelah menikah, atau membunuh seseorang, yang mana ia sendiri akan dibunuh karenanya.'

1576.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Masud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The blood of a man who testifies that there is no god but Allah and that I am the Messenger of Allah is not lawful except in one of three cases: life for life, the married adulterer, and the one who abandons his religion and separates from the community.'
1576.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Masud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Darah seseorang yang bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah dan bahwa aku adalah Rasulullah tidak halal kecuali dalam satu dari tiga hal: jiwa dibalas jiwa, pezina yang sudah menikah, dan orang yang meninggalkan agamanya dan memisahkan diri dari jamaah.'

1577.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that Safwan ibn Umayyah was sleeping in the mosque when a man came while he was sleeping and took his cloak from under his head. He woke up and caught the man, then brought him to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, this man stole my cloak.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Cut off his hand.' Safwan said: 'I did not intend that.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Then why did you bring him before me?'
1577.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Safwan ibn Umayyah sedang tidur di masjid ketika seorang laki-laki datang saat ia tidur dan mengambil selendangnya dari bawah kepalanya. Ia terbangun dan menangkap laki-laki itu, kemudian membawanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, laki-laki ini mencuri selendangku.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Potonglah tangannya.' Safwan berkata: 'Aku tidak bermaksud demikian.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Lalu mengapa kamu membawanya kepadaku?'

1578.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The hand is cut off for a quarter dinar and above.'
1578.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tangan dipotong untuk (pencurian senilai) seperempat dinar ke atas.'

1579.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ cut off a hand for a shield (mijan) worth three dirhams.
1579.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memotong tangan seseorang karena mencuri perisai (mijan) yang nilainya tiga dirham.

1580.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Quraysh were troubled by the affair of the Makhzumi woman who had stolen. They said: 'Who will intercede with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for her?' They said: 'Who is bold enough to approach him except Usamah ibn Zayd, the beloved of the Messenger of Allah?' So Usamah spoke to him, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Usamah, are you interceding regarding one of the prescribed punishments of Allah?' Then he stood and delivered a speech saying: 'Verily those before you were destroyed because when a noble person among them stole, they let him go, but when a weak person stole, they applied the punishment to him. By Allah, if Fatimah daughter of Muhammad were to steal, Muhammad would cut off her hand.'
1580.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa kaum Quraisy sangat terganggu dengan urusan wanita Makhzumiyah yang telah mencuri. Mereka berkata: 'Siapa yang akan memberi syafaat kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuknya?' Mereka berkata: 'Siapa yang berani mendekatinya selain Usamah ibn Zayd, kekasih Rasulullah?' Maka Usamah berbicara kepadanya, dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Usamah, apakah kamu memberikan syafaat mengenai salah satu hukum had Allah?' Kemudian beliau berdiri dan berkhutbah: 'Sesungguhnya orang-orang sebelum kalian binasa karena ketika orang mulia di antara mereka mencuri, mereka membiarkannya, tetapi ketika orang lemah mencuri, mereka menerapkan hukuman kepadanya. Demi Allah, seandainya Fatimah putri Muhammad mencuri, Muhammad pasti akan memotong tangannya.'

1581.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Umayyah al-Makhzumi (may Allah be pleased with him) that a thief was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ who had confessed but with whom no stolen goods were found. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I do not think you stole.' He said: 'Yes, I did.' He repeated it three times, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave the order and his hand was cut off.
1581.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Umayyah al-Makhzumi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pencuri dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ yang telah mengaku mencuri tetapi tidak ditemukan barang curian padanya. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku kira kamu tidak mencuri.' Ia berkata: 'Ya, aku mencuri.' Ia mengulanginya tiga kali, dan Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan untuk memotong tangannya.

1582.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'There is no amputation for fruit or palm dates (kathar).'
1582.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada pemotongan tangan karena mencuri buah-buahan atau pucuk kurma (kathar).'

1583.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'There is no amputation for fruit or palm dates.'
1583.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada pemotongan tangan karena mencuri buah-buahan atau pucuk kurma.'

1584.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no amputation for fruit or palm dates.'
1584.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada pemotongan tangan karena mencuri buah-buahan atau pucuk kurma.'

1585.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'There is no amputation for fruit or palm dates.'
1585.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada pemotongan tangan karena mencuri buah-buahan atau pucuk kurma.'

1586.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'There is no amputation for fruit or palm dates.'
1586.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada pemotongan tangan karena mencuri buah-buahan atau pucuk kurma.'

1587.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no amputation for a plunderer (munatahib), nor a snatcher (mukhtalis), nor a traitor (kha'in).'
1587.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada pemotongan tangan bagi perampok (munatahib), bagi penjambret (mukhtalis), maupun bagi pengkhianat (kha'in).'

1588.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man who had drunk wine was brought to the Prophet ﷺ and he struck him with two palm branches. Then Abu Bakr did the same. When Umar became caliph, he consulted the people and Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf said: 'The lightest of the hadd punishments is eighty lashes.' So Umar ordered it to be eighty.
1588.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki yang minum khamar dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau memukulnya dengan dua pelepah kurma. Kemudian Abu Bakr melakukan hal yang sama. Ketika Umar menjadi khalifah, ia bermusyawarah dengan orang-orang, dan Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf berkata: 'Hukuman had yang paling ringan adalah delapan puluh kali cambukan.' Maka Umar memerintahkan agar dihukum delapan puluh kali cambukan.

1589.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) was present when Uthman ibn Affan brought al-Walid ibn Uqbah who had drunk wine. Ali said: 'The Prophet ﷺ gave forty lashes, Abu Bakr gave forty lashes, and Umar gave eighty lashes; all of them are Sunnah, but this one (eighty) is more dear to me.'
1589.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) hadir ketika Uthman ibn Affan membawa al-Walid ibn Uqbah yang telah minum khamar. Ali berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ memberikan empat puluh cambukan, Abu Bakr memberikan empat puluh cambukan, dan Umar memberikan delapan puluh cambukan; semuanya adalah Sunnah, namun yang ini (delapan puluh) lebih aku sukai.'

1590.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sharid ibn Suwayd al-Thaqafi (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'There should be no self-inflicted harm and no harm done by others, and a lewd person (mukhannath) should not be lashed.'
1590.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sharid ibn Suwayd al-Thaqafi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak boleh ada bahaya yang ditimbulkan pada diri sendiri maupun bahaya yang ditimbulkan oleh orang lain, dan orang yang berperilaku seperti wanita (mukhannath) tidak boleh dicambuk.'

1591.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Burdah ibn Niyar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'No one should be flogged more than ten lashes except for one of the prescribed punishments of Allah.'
1591.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Burdah ibn Niyar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak boleh seseorang dicambuk lebih dari sepuluh kali cambukan kecuali dalam salah satu hukuman had Allah.'

1592.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from the Aslam tribe came to the Prophet ﷺ and told him that he had committed adultery and testified against himself four times. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then ordered him to be stoned and he was stoned.
1592.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki dari suku Aslam datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan memberitahunya bahwa ia telah berzina serta bersaksi atas dirinya sendiri empat kali. Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian memerintahkan agar ia dirajam dan ia pun dirajam.

1593.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Ma'iz ibn Malik, a short man wearing a lower garment and no upper garment, was brought to the Prophet ﷺ. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: "Perhaps you only kissed, or touched, or looked?" He said: "No, O Messenger of Allah." He asked: "Did you do with her what a man does with his wife?" He said: "Yes." He said: "You mean just as a peg enters a kohl container?" He said: "Yes." He ordered him to be stoned and he was stoned.'
1593.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ma'iz ibn Malik, seorang laki-laki pendek yang mengenakan sarung tanpa kain atas, dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Mungkin kamu hanya mencium, atau menyentuh, atau memandang?" Ia menjawab: "Tidak, wahai Rasulullah." Beliau bertanya: "Apakah kamu melakukan kepadanya apa yang dilakukan seorang laki-laki kepada istrinya?" Ia menjawab: "Ya." Beliau bertanya: "Maksudmu seperti paku masuk ke tempat celak?" Ia menjawab: "Ya." Beliau memerintahkan agar ia dirajam dan ia pun dirajam.'

1594.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah, Zayd ibn Khalid, and Shibl (may Allah be pleased with them) that they said: 'A man came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while we were present and said: "O Messenger of Allah, if my slave girl commits adultery and I find no husband for her, shall I apply the hadd to her?" The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "If she commits adultery, flog her. If she commits adultery again, flog her. If she commits adultery a third time, sell her, even for a rope of hair."'
1594.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah, Zayd ibn Khalid, dan Shibl (radhiyallahu 'anhum) bahwa mereka berkata: 'Seorang laki-laki datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ saat kami hadir dan berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, jika budak perempuanku berzina dan aku tidak mendapati suami untuknya, apakah aku harus menegakkan hadd atasnya?" Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Jika ia berzina, cermbuklah ia. Jika ia berzina lagi, cambuklah ia. Jika ia berzina ketiga kalinya, jualah ia meskipun hanya dengan tali rambut."'

1595.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nahr ibn Dahr al-Aslami (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when a man came and confessed to adultery. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ turned away from him. He confessed again on the second side, and he turned away from him. He confessed again on the third side, and he turned away from him. When he confessed a fourth time, the Prophet ﷺ ordered him to be stoned and he was stoned.'
1595.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nahr ibn Dahr al-Aslami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami sedang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ ketika seorang laki-laki datang dan mengaku berzina. Rasulullah ﷺ berpaling darinya. Ia mengaku lagi dari sisi kedua, dan beliau berpaling darinya. Ia mengaku lagi dari sisi ketiga, dan beliau berpaling darinya. Ketika ia mengaku untuk keempat kalinya, Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar ia dirajam dan ia pun dirajam.'

1596.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Take Ma'iz ibn Malik and stone him.' We took him to the Baqi cemetery and stoned him. When the stones struck him he fled, but we overtook him at al-Harra and stoned him until he died.
1596.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bawa Ma'iz ibn Malik dan rajam ia.' Kami membawanya ke pemakaman Baqi dan merajamnya. Ketika batu-batu mengenainya ia melarikan diri, tetapi kami menyusulnya di al-Harra dan merajamnya sampai mati.

1597.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraydah al-Aslami (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was sitting with the Prophet ﷺ when a woman from the Ghamid tribe came to him and said: "O Prophet of Allah, I have committed adultery." He turned away from her. She confessed a second time, a third time, and a fourth time. When she had confessed four times he told her to leave until she had given birth. After giving birth she was brought to him and he gave orders for her to be stoned. She was stoned.'
1597.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraydah al-Aslami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku sedang duduk bersama Nabi ﷺ ketika seorang wanita dari suku Ghamid datang kepadanya dan berkata: "Wahai Nabi Allah, aku telah berzina." Beliau berpaling darinya. Ia mengaku untuk kedua kalinya, ketiga kalinya, dan keempat kalinya. Ketika ia telah mengaku empat kali beliau menyuruhnya pergi sampai ia melahirkan. Setelah melahirkan ia dibawa kepadanya dan beliau memerintahkan agar ia dirajam. Ia pun dirajam.'

1598.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Jews came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with a man and a woman among them who had committed adultery. He asked: 'What do you do with someone who commits adultery among you?' They said: 'We blacken their faces and beat them.' He said: 'Do you not find the stoning (rajm) in the Torah?' They said: 'We find nothing in it.' Abdullah ibn Salam said: 'You lie. Bring the Torah and recite it if you are truthful.' They brought it and placed it, and one of them covered the verse about stoning with his hand, and read what was before and after it. Ibn Salam said: 'Lift your hand.' He lifted it and the verse of stoning appeared. He said: 'He spoke the truth, O Messenger of Allah, the verse of stoning is in it.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ ordered them to be stoned and they were stoned.
1598.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang Yahudi membawa seorang laki-laki dan seorang wanita dari mereka yang telah berzina kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau bertanya: 'Apa yang kalian lakukan terhadap orang yang berzina di antara kalian?' Mereka menjawab: 'Kami menghitamkan wajah mereka dan memukul mereka.' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidakkah kalian menemukan rajam dalam Taurat?' Mereka berkata: 'Kami tidak menemukan apa pun di dalamnya.' Abdullah ibn Salam berkata: 'Kalian bohong. Bawakan Taurat dan bacalah jika kalian jujur.' Mereka membawanya dan meletakkannya, dan salah seorang dari mereka menutupi ayat tentang rajam dengan tangannya, lalu membacakan apa yang sebelum dan sesudahnya. Ibn Salam berkata: 'Angkat tanganmu.' Ia mengangkatnya dan ayat rajam pun tampak. Ia berkata: 'Ia benar, wahai Rasulullah, ayat rajam ada di dalamnya.' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan agar keduanya dirajam dan mereka pun dirajam.

1599.iwh_en: Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'Verily Allah sent Muhammad ﷺ with the truth and revealed to him the Book. Among what was revealed to him was the verse of stoning (ayat al-rajm). We recited it and understood it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ applied stoning and we applied it after him. I fear that as time passes, someone will say: "We do not find stoning in the Book of Allah," and so they will go astray by abandoning an obligation that Allah has revealed. Verily stoning is the truth for the married fornicator, man or woman, when there is evidence or pregnancy or confession.'
1599.iwh_id: Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Sesungguhnya Allah mengutus Muhammad ﷺ dengan kebenaran dan menurunkan Kitab kepadanya. Di antara yang diturunkan kepadanya adalah ayat rajam. Kami membacanya dan memahaminya. Rasulullah ﷺ melaksanakan rajam dan kami melaksanakannya setelah beliau. Aku khawatir seiring berlalunya waktu, seseorang akan berkata: "Kami tidak menemukan rajam dalam Kitab Allah," dan mereka pun tersesat dengan meninggalkan kewajiban yang telah Allah turunkan. Sesungguhnya rajam adalah kebenaran bagi pezina yang sudah menikah, laki-laki maupun perempuan, ketika ada bukti, kehamilan, atau pengakuan.'

1600.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I bear witness that I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Stoning (rajm) is true, and it is in the Book of Allah."'
1600.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bersaksi bahwa aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Rajam adalah benar, dan ia ada dalam Kitab Allah."'

1601.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraydah al-Aslami (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was sitting with the Prophet ﷺ when a woman from Ghamid came and said: "O Prophet of Allah, purify me." He said: "Woe to you. Go back and seek forgiveness and repent to Allah." She said: "I think you want to turn me away as you turned away Ma'iz ibn Malik." He said: "What is the matter with you?" She said: "I am pregnant from adultery." He said: "Is it you?" She said: "Yes." He said: "Not until you give birth." A man from the Ansar took responsibility for her until she gave birth. He came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: "The Ghamidiyyah has given birth." He said: "Then we will not stone her and leave her child without a nursemaid." A man from the Ansar took over the nursing for her. Then he came to him and he ordered her stoning, and she was stoned.'
1601.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraydah al-Aslami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku sedang duduk bersama Nabi ﷺ ketika seorang wanita dari Ghamid datang dan berkata: "Wahai Nabi Allah, sucikanlah aku." Beliau bersabda: "Celaka kamu. Kembalilah dan mintalah ampunan serta bertaubatlah kepada Allah." Ia berkata: "Aku kira engkau ingin mengusirku seperti engkau mengusir Ma'iz ibn Malik." Beliau bertanya: "Ada apa denganmu?" Ia berkata: "Aku hamil dari zina." Beliau bertanya: "Benarkah?" Ia menjawab: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Tidak, sampai kamu melahirkan." Seorang laki-laki dari kaum Anshar mengambil tanggung jawab atasnya sampai ia melahirkan. Ia datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: "Wanita Ghamidiyah telah melahirkan." Beliau bersabda: "Kalau begitu kami tidak akan merajamnya dan meninggalkan anaknya tanpa ibu susu." Seorang laki-laki dari kaum Anshar mengambil alih pengasuhan anak itu. Kemudian ia datang kepadanya dan beliau memerintahkan agar ia dirajam, dan ia pun dirajam.'

1602.iwh_en: It was narrated from Imran ibn Husayn (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman from Juhaynah came to the Prophet ﷺ while she was pregnant from adultery and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I have committed a prescribed offence, so apply it to me.' The Prophet ﷺ called her guardian and said: 'Be good to her, and when she gives birth bring her to me.' When she gave birth he brought her, and the Prophet ﷺ commanded her clothes to be tied tightly around her. Then he ordered her to be stoned and she was stoned. He then prayed over her. Umar said to him: 'O Prophet of Allah, you pray over her when she has committed adultery?' He said: 'She has repented a repentance that if it were divided among seventy people of Madinah it would be sufficient for them. Have you found anyone who gives something more excellent than sacrificing her own soul for Allah?'
1602.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Imran ibn Husayn (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang wanita dari suku Juhaynah datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dalam keadaan hamil akibat zina dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku telah melakukan pelanggaran yang ada hukumannya, maka tegakkanlah itu atasku.' Nabi ﷺ memanggil walinya dan bersabda: 'Perlakukan ia dengan baik, dan ketika ia melahirkan bawalah ia kepadaku.' Ketika ia melahirkan, walinya membawanya, dan Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar pakaiannya diikat erat-erat. Kemudian beliau memerintahkan agar ia dirajam dan ia pun dirajam. Beliau kemudian menshalatinya. Umar berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Nabi Allah, engkau menshalatinya padahal ia telah berzina?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ia telah bertaubat dengan taubat yang seandainya dibagi kepada tujuh puluh orang Madinah niscaya mencukupi mereka. Adakah yang kamu dapati lebih mulia daripada ia yang mengorbankan dirinya untuk Allah?'

1603.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani and Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with them) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about a slave girl who commits adultery without being married. He said: 'If she commits adultery, flog her; if she commits adultery again, flog her; if she commits adultery a third time, sell her, even for a hair rope.'
1603.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani dan Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang budak perempuan yang berzina tanpa sudah menikah. Beliau bersabda: 'Jika ia berzina, cambuklah ia; jika ia berzina lagi, cambuklah ia; jika ia berzina untuk ketiga kalinya, jualah ia, meskipun hanya dengan tali rambut.'

1604.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubadah ibn al-Samit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Take from me, take from me. Allah has appointed a way for them: for the unmarried with the unmarried it is one hundred lashes and exile for one year; and for the married with the married it is one hundred lashes and stoning.'
1604.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubadah ibn al-Samit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ambillah dariku, ambillah dariku. Allah telah menetapkan jalan bagi mereka: untuk yang belum menikah dengan yang belum menikah adalah seratus kali cambukan dan pengasingan selama satu tahun; dan untuk yang sudah menikah dengan yang sudah menikah adalah seratus kali cambukan dan rajam.'

1605.iwh_en: It was narrated from Habib ibn Salim that a young man who was called Qurqurah committed an act with his wife's slave girl and the matter was brought before al-Nu'man ibn Bashir. He wrote to ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it. He ﷺ replied: 'If the wife permitted him to have her slave girl, flog him one hundred lashes; if she did not permit him, stone him to death.'
1605.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Habib ibn Salim bahwa seorang pemuda yang dipanggil Qurqurah melakukan suatu perbuatan dengan budak perempuan istrinya, dan perkara tersebut dibawa kepada al-Nu'man ibn Bashir. Ia menulis untuk bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang hal itu. Beliau ﷺ menjawab: 'Jika istri mengizinkannya untuk menggauli budak perempuannya, cambuklah ia seratus kali; jika ia tidak mengizinkannya, rajamlah ia sampai mati.'

1606.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzaymah ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever has a prescribed punishment (hadd) applied to him, that is his expiation.'
1606.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzaymah ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang ditegakkan hukuman had atasnya, maka itu adalah penghapus dosanya.'
